issues.title: Player never exceeded 48 HP (60%) after floor 3 (max: 21)
issues.description: After floor 3, the player's HP never exceeded 21, which is below the 60% threshold (48 HP). This suggests healing is insufficient to sustain longer runs.

issues.title: Floor 2 enc 2: 18 turns vs prev floor avg 2.7
issues.description: Encounter 2 on floor 2 took 18 turns to resolve, which is more than 2x the previous floor's average of 2.7 turns. This indicates a difficulty spike.
